title: Creating and Managing Issues Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on GitHub issue tracking.

questions.question: Regarding GitHub, what is an 'Issue' used for?
options: To track and prioritize specific tasks, bug fixes, or feature requests for a project

questions.question: Which of these is a key benefit of using GitHub issues for your project development?
options: It provides a central location for tracking and prioritizing work tasks among team members
It makes your local machine faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
